title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Reasoning: Isolating guarantees at least 20 utility (if all isolate) or 40 utility (if others coordinate), while coordinating risks 0 utility if even one civilization isolates. Given 100 independent actors with random choices, the probability of universal coordination is negligible, making isolation the dominant strategy under uncertainty.

CHOICE: B

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Reasoning: Choosing ISOLATE guarantees a minimum utility of 20, avoiding the catastrophic 0 utility risk of COORDINATE if even one other civilization defects. Given 100 independent civilizations with unknown reasoning, universal coordination is statistically improbable, making ISOLATE the risk-averse choice that prioritizes survival over speculative high rewards.

CHOICE: B

title: Galactic Stag Hunt

raw_response:
The structural similarity in reasoning processes across civilizations implies a high likelihood of convergent decision-making, where all agents recognize that universal COORDINATION yields the highest mutual utility (100) compared to the fragmented outcome of ISOLATION (20). Given the payoff dominance and the absence of causal influence, logical correlation suggests that choosing COORDINATE maximizes expected utility by aligning with the optimal symmetric equilibrium, despite the theoretical vulnerability.  

CHOICE: A

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
The reasoning hinges on logical similarity: since all civilizations use near-identical decision algorithms, they will converge on the same choice. Choosing COORDINATE is the only path to the optimal outcome (100 utility) if universal coordination occurs, whereas ISOLATE guarantees a worse outcome (20 utility) even if others reciprocate. Given the symmetry, rational agents should select the strategy that yields the highest payoff when universally adopted.  

CHOICE: A

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
This is a symmetric game where all civilizations must reach the same conclusion due to identical reasoning. Choosing COORDINATE logically ensures all civilizations coordinate (yielding 100 utility each), as mixed outcomes are impossible—identical reasoning prevents vulnerability. Isolating would force universal isolation (20 utility), which is strictly worse than coordination's payoff.

CHOICE: A
